pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing the task description in task.json and the data injection script in setup_task.sh.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which populates all inserted contact emails with the '@enron.com' domain.
Verified from the task description in task.json.
Counted exactly 6 contact records assigned to the 'Legal' department in the setup_task.sh Python data injection script.
Counted exactly 10 contact records assigned to departments other than 'Legal' in the setup_task.sh Python data injection script.

privileged_info_summary: The task initializes a synthetic Thunderbird Address Book with 16 total contacts via setup_task.sh. Exactly 6 of these contacts belong to the 'Legal' department, and the remaining 10 belong to non-legal departments. All initial contacts use the domain '@enron.com'. The agent is expected to update the domain to '@enron-legal.com' exclusively for the 6 Legal department contacts.
